label: Error Handler
description: Receives routed errors from upstream nodes and handles them via log, notify, transform, or retry actions.

settings.name: errorAction
settings.label: Action
settings.description: What to do when an error arrives.

settings.name: transformExpression
settings.label: Transform Expression
settings.description: JS expression used when action=transform. Has access to `error` (the error value) and `input` (the original node input). Return the transformed result.

ai.shortDescription: Handle upstream errors — log, notify, transform, or retry.
ai.whenToUse: Connect to any node's error port to route failures. Use log for audit, notify for alerting, transform to reshape the error into a recovery payload, or retry to re-queue.
ai.examplePrompt: add an error handler that logs the error and sends a Slack notification
ai.promptHints: The `error` input object contains `{ error, input, nodeId }`. `transformExpression` runs sandboxed — use `error.error` and `error.input` to access parts of the error payload.
